data.body: Investigation: hook_worktree_isolation_guard correctly allows dispatch when a valid auth marker exists — verified via unit test (test_function_allows_with_valid_marker passes). The deny path only fires when isolation_enabled=true AND no live-PID marker exists. The bug may have been observed during a transient state (e.g., config not yet set, or marker written with subprocess PID that exited before hook checked). Current code is correct. Recommend closing after user confirmation.
